programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep110
programme.desc: Liquid Edge examines the subject of surf territorialism and the Aloha Spirit; the beauty and challenge of stand-up paddling in Tahiti; extreme whitewater kayaking. Included is an amazing look behind the scenes of the 3D movie adventure Storm Surfers, plus a spectacular kiteboarding sweet spot.

programme.title: Whales In A Changing Ocean
programme.desc: Wildlife cinematographer Richard Sidey joins an international team of whale research scientists in Antarctica to document their work on how humpback whales adapt to a changing ocean.

programme.title: Travel Quest Ep108: North Pole
programme.desc: The Travel Quest crew takes an icebreaker to the North Pole just in time to make a satellite phone call to wish Bill's mother a happy birthday (she is so shocked she doesn't recognize him). We also track and film the biggest predators on earth…polar bears.

programme.title: Fly Rod Chronicles: In-Depth Look at Brook Trout in West Virginia
programme.desc: We learn about Brook Trout with West Virginia DNR Fisheries Biologist, Brandon Keplinger, TU's Dustin Wichterman, and their children.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep305: Formula Foil World Championships
programme.desc: The Formula Foil World Championships from Saint Moritz, Switzerland.

programme.title: Blue World Ep507: Sand Tiger Sharks + Marine Biology in Turks Caicos
programme.desc: Blue World heads to North Carolina to observe how shipwrecks have become home to thousands of animals, including Sand Tiger sharks. But instead of chasing the fish, the sharks are protecting them! Then, we visit the School for Field Studies in the Turks Caicos Islands to learn how to tag sharks!

programme.title: Hot Water Ep104: V8 Jet Sprinting Superboat Championships
programme.desc: Hot Water showcases the world’s best in adrenalized water-related motorsports. This episode features Round 4 of Jet Sprinting from Cabarita in New South Wales, Australia. V8 Unlimited Superboats are the top racing class in Jet Sprinting with the boats being unrestricted.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep110
programme.desc: Liquid Edge examines the subject of surf territorialism and the Aloha Spirit; the beauty and challenge of stand-up paddling in Tahiti; extreme whitewater kayaking. Included is an amazing look behind the scenes of the 3D movie adventure Storm Surfers, plus a spectacular kiteboarding sweet spot.

programme.title: Whales In A Changing Ocean
programme.desc: Wildlife cinematographer Richard Sidey joins an international team of whale research scientists in Antarctica to document their work on how humpback whales adapt to a changing ocean.

programme.title: Billabong Presents: The Cape
programme.desc: What happens when good winds, good weather, and a solid swell come together along one of the rawest stretches of coastline on the planet? You don't stop. Surfers Taj Burrow, Shaun Manners, Jaleesa Vincent, and Matt Bromley test their staying power on this Adventure Division strike mission.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: The Backyard
programme.desc: At Pipeline there is flora, fauna, ocean and stone. Volcom Stone. At this point, the Volcom house is practically part of the reef. Between the team, the family, the legacy, the peanut gallery, the respect, the Pipe Pro and the barbecues, you’d be hard pressed not to notice Volcom on the North Shore.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: XO - Coco Ho
programme.desc: Step into the world of pro surfer Coco Ho. Raised on Oahu’s North Shore, the film explores how Ho got started in the water, her surfing family history, and the ups and downs of the Championship Tour. Featuring brother Mason Ho, father Michael Ho, and surfers John John Florence and Stephanie Gilmore.

programme.title: Kaiwi Winds
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Tweakin' On Boards With Ryan Burch
programme.desc: Tweakin’ on Boards was shot in 2009. Seems like a second ago and forever ago. Truth is it’s both. As a surfer and filmmaker, Burch isn’t content complaining everything's already been done. Says fellow surfer Cyrus Sutton, “He needs to FEEL history for himself.” This film is that and more.

programme.title: Atoms and Void - Lay Down Your Weapons
programme.desc: “Lay Down Your Weapons” is a respite from the cacophony of the world. Atoms and Void is musician Arlie Carstens, of Seattle’s Juno, and producer Eric Fisher. Known for his skateboarding films, Director Greg Hunt here lets landscapes and cityscapes slowly unfold. Breathe deeply, watch and listen.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 1: Don’t Lie Down
programme.desc: In 1953, W. Horace Carter won the Pulitzer Prize for his editorials opposing the KKK. This brave work lead to the FBI’s takedown of the Carolina Klans. Today, The Carters continue to champion civil rights and the environment. Grandson Wes Carter now fights for the world’s waterways. Don’t lie down.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 2: Plastic, Plastic, Everywhere
programme.desc: We join pro surfer and Journey To A New Earth advocate Koa Smith to learn about the problem of microplastics on Oahu’s North Shore. We explore efforts underway to fix the issue and spotlight a few of the ways entrepreneurs are utilizing the reclaimed materials to develop new innovative products.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 3: Walking the Walk
programme.desc: Ron Artisi has sandy toes. When taking a closer look with the crew from Sustainable Coastlines Hawaii, his world is shattered. Bob Hurley shares the tale of a young woman building an army to clean the rivers in Bali. Wes Carter explores Fishbone Carriers, the alternative to plastic 6-pack rings.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 4: No More Bubbles
programme.desc: In Episode 4 of Journey to a New Earth, Wes Carter of Atlantic Packaging talks with water photographer Clark Little, shaper Jon Pyzel, and big wave rider Kai Lenny. They join the journey, offering insights and solutions for the problematic issue of single-use plastics in the surf industry.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 5: Clean This Mess Up
programme.desc: In Episode 5, we talk with 11x World Surf League Champion, Kelly Slater, about the growing problem of plastic pollution around the world. We learn about the ways he’s chosen to make a difference with his company, Outerknown, and discuss the power of community to make real and lasting change.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 6: Jaws of Consumerism
programme.desc: Olympic Gold Medalist and 5x World Champion, Carissa Moore, shares how people and brands can eliminate single-use plastics. Juan Oliphant and Ocean Ramsey explain how shark populations are a crucial barometer for the health of our oceans. Florence Marine X talks sustainable solutions in packaging!

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 7: Decisions
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 8: Let’s Change This
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Evo Explores: Kimmy Fasani
programme.desc: Over the course of her career, snowboarder Kimmy Fasani has won the coveted “Women’s Rider of The Year Award” from TransWorld Snowboarding Magazine, and the “Women’s Video Part of The Year Award” from Snowboarder Magazine. This fascinating documentary captures Fasani’s first time riding in Alaska.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Brandon Cocard
programme.desc: An early morning of magic in Haines, Alaska with the Absinthe Films crew. Featuring: Brandon Cocard Kimmy Fasani, Nicolas Müller

programme.title: Echo Chamber
programme.desc: In 2020, Brandon Cocard dropped “Echo Chamber,” featuring cameos from Miles Fallon, Kazu Kokubo, Taylor Elliott, Brendon Rego, Kevin Backstrom, Mike Rav, Kaede Yasunaga, Keisuke Yoshida and Chris Beresford. Filmed in Hokkaido, Japan and Salt Lake City, Utah by Sam Tuor. Music by Cocard and friends.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Nippow Holiday
programme.desc: Snowboarder Terje Haakonsen invites the filmmaker and musician, Leo Cittadella, to join him and Rip Zinger on a powder trip to Hokkaido, Japan. Along the way, they meet up with Nicolas Müller and Mikkel Bang to film for the Absinthe Films feature "TurboDojo.”

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo One
programme.desc: On his 45th trip to Japan (since 1991), Terje rides powder in the Japanese Alps with the snowboarders Leo Cittadella, Rip Zinger, Curtis Ciszek, Oli Gittler and Ian Tobin.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 5
programme.desc: For its fifth event of the sixth season, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans were invited to visit Muscat for the final event of the 2019 GC32 Racing Tour, the GC32 Oman Cup. The event, held in Muscat, has been jointly organized by Oman Sail and the host venue partners EFG Private Banking as well as fragrance brand Amouj and the Sultanate of Oman Ministry of Tourism. The Oman Cup was the final of the 2019 GC32 Racing Tour and will decide this year’s overall podium places. Unquestionably the big fight was for top spot between the local heroes Oman Air and Ernesto Bertarelli’s World Champions Alinghi.With so many teams close on the leader board, there was the potential for some crucial match races amongst the fleet.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1977, the Cannes Yachting Festival takes place every September in elegant, luxurious surroundings in the sparkling bay of Cannes. We are ready for the 2018 edition that promises the latest trends in the nautical industry. Jump on board the 2018 Cannes Yachting Festival to discover superyachts, equipment, regattas, competitions and more.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: The Faith Community
programme.desc: A group of religious students drive into the remote wilderness to spend time with a religious sect and strengthen their bond with God. The three unsuspecting students film everything to document their experience but soon find themselves in the dark.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: Cut Her Out
programme.desc: Darcy can't purge her mind of the animalistic abuse she suffered as a child at the hands of her mother. Darcy's therapist Ryan discovers that her family homestead has been abandoned.

programme.title: Death Mask
programme.desc: Wilbur works in an old carnival and shows some gruesome things to the puplic. He covered his face because he had a sadistic father who burned his face. Everybody makes jokes about his scars and when the new boss fired him, he go to an old swamp-witch who gives him a peace of wood from a hanging tree and Wilbur makes a mask from this piece of wood and put all his anger in this mask. When he puts the mask on, everybody who looks on this mask commits suicide. He has created the Death-Mask.

programme.title: Forces

programme.title: I Knew You Were My Kind

A fleeting day of vacation becomes a moment of solidarity and tenderness that challenges the structural norms that govern their daily lives.

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Campus Life Experience - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this second episode of Campus Life Experience, Laura gets on the site and checks everything is cleaned properly and in order. She teaches us how to disinfect wraps to protect horses from diseases. Then, we go for a walk with the horses and try different exercises to work on the horse-rider combination.

programme.title: Campus Life Experience - Episode 3
programme.desc: Laura Conz starts this episode making sure all students have their helmets on to avoid any accidents before teaching them regarding horses health and how to take care of their legs. Then, both horse and rider will be receiving ultrasound massage to help their circulation flow properly before learning more health tips from their teachers.

programme.title: Jumping International de Dinard - Grand Prix
programme.desc: The acclaimed CSI5* Grand Prix de la Ville de Dinard is, together with the Derby, one of the top events of the Jumping International de Dinard. programme.title: It Will Come Together
programme.desc: In “It Will Come Together,” we’re shown that, no matter what we’re going through, God can bring it together for good.

programme.title: The One Who Seeks... Finds!
programme.desc: In “The One Who Seeks… Finds!” we’re reminded that during difficult seasons, we can either look for reasons to grumble or reasons to hope.

programme.title: Blown Away
programme.desc: In “Blown Away!” we learn to let go of what’s been holding us back, so we can step into what God’s been preparing for us all along.

programme.title: Life After the Let Down
programme.desc: In “Life After The Let Down,” we’re reminded how powerful God’s grace is — even after we’ve faced unmet expectations.

programme.title: The Blessing Of Letting Go
programme.desc: In “The Blessing Of Letting Go,” Pastor Steven Furtick teaches us that when we worship God in the middle of our situation, it relieves the pressure we feel when we try to handle it on our own.

programme.title: Forgiving What You Can't Forget
programme.desc: Forgiveness is God's provision to heal. In "Forgiving What You Can't Forget," Lysa TerKeurst shares how to stop reducing your life down to the limitations of living hurt and move toward the freedom found only through forgiveness.

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento.

programme.title: 48 Horas de Terror
programme.desc: Mateo un escritor citadino adquiere una casa de campo en donde planea vivir con su esposa y escribir en la tranquilidad del campo, pero no tomo en cuenta las trágicas noticias de los acontecimientos de canibalismo que ocurrieron a manos de sus vecinos quienes solo buscan sacias su hambre.

programme.title: The Juniors y La Formula Imperial
programme.desc: Narra las vidas de 7 adolescentes millonarios que se aventuran a planificar una revolución social, generada por vídeo-escándalos y experimentos médicos, con el objetivo de generar un cambio en la ideología mundial, el conflicto entre las clases sociales y el enfrentamiento con sus muchachas de servicio doméstico.

programme.title: Fantasías
programme.desc: La historia de Brenda y Antonio, una pareja de clase media con dos hijos adolescentes y una vida sexual aburrida, en busca de nuevas experiencias, primero con su sexy sirvienta. Más tarde, siguiendo el consejo de Esther, una amiga mayor que tiene un estilo de vida swinger junto con su esposo, deciden explorar la posibilidad de despertar una nueva pasión al ligar con Miguel y Claudia, una pareja swinger. Pero luego llegan los problemas.

programme.title: Borrar de la Memoria
programme.desc: Una historia de amor se transforma en una historia de persecuciones y asesinatos sin esclarecer en el contexto de la masacre estudiantil de octubre de 1968. Más de 40 años después, un periodista tenaz se da a la tarea de aclarar los crímenes bajo condiciones muy peligrosas, con el objetivo de llevar la verdad ante la justicia. Ello representa un esfuerzo dedicado a obligar a un país a reconocer la negación de la reconciliación y el cierre de trágicos acontecimientos políticos y sociales en su historia.

programme.title: Amar
programme.desc: Carlos quiere pero Susana no. Joel no quiere pero Patricia lo obliga. Gabriel lo espera pero Martha no se lo da. Amado lo busca con una gringa y lo pierde. Benito lo tiene toda la vida. Concha se lo lleva más allá del sistema solar. Todos lo quieren y todos lo dan pero unos no lo reciben y otros quieren más. Así es Amar.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
